text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the Takarazuka Kinen. Meisho Doto,
stationed right behind T.M. Opera O, assumes her
role as Opera O's second-in-command.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Half a year earlier, when Admire Vega was forced
to drop out, T.M. Opera O had spoken of having
no choice but to wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In truth, what she was waiting for was Meisho
Doto's awakening. The time has come for Doto to
display her race-readiness through her running.
